game.invalid_placement: Invalid placement! You must place next to an existing tile or on an empty field.
game.must_eliminate_adjacent: You must eliminate an adjacent cell!
game.timeout_loss: {player} lost due to inactivity (3 missed turns)!
game.leaver_warning_message: If you leave now, you will lose up to 100 coins and your opponent will receive coins for their current max connected group.
game.leaver_warning_message_ranked: If you leave now, you will lose this ranked match and your rating will drop.

coins.grid_locked: This board size is locked. Unlock it in the lobby first.
coins.ranked_requires_8x8: Ranked play requires the 8×8 board. Unlock it below to start matchmaking.
coins.wallet_alert_message:
Balance: {amount} BGC

Earn coins by playing Standard matchmaking games.

items.title: 1. Placing a dot
items.text: Players take turns placing one dot of their color on an empty cell. The dot can be placed on any empty cell that has at least one empty neighbor. Dots do not have to be immediately next to another dot, but if you place them further from your group they won't connect to it.

items.title: 2. Eliminating a cell
items.text: After placing a dot you must eliminate one adjacent cell. The eliminated cell remains blocked for the rest of the game for both players.

items.title: 3. Score points
items.text: Your score is the number of dots in your largest connected group of dots.

items.title: 4. Game end
items.text: The game ends when no more moves are possible. The highest score wins. If both players have the same score, it's a draw.

items.title: Standard game
items.text: Coins can only be earned in standard games with matchmaking. Standard games allow you to choose the board size and include a 30-second timer. You can also create or join rooms manually, but you won't earn coins from those games.

items.title: Ranked game
items.text: Ranked games always use an 8×8 board, 30-second turns, and matchmaking only. You must unlock the 8×8 board to play ranked games.

notifications.opponent_left_no_rating_change: Opponent has left the ranked match. You won - your rating has been updated.
notifications.room_not_found: Room not found or game has already started.
